title: 1: Code Maintainability
1.1: Introduces the ControlSurface struct in api/v1/ with all 5 required fields (RunCtx, Samples, MetricsEngine, Scheduler, RunState)

1.2: Updates all 10 handler functions in api/v1/ (handleGetGroups, handleGetGroup, handleGetMetrics, handleGetMetric, handleGetSetupData, handleSetSetupData, handleRunSetup, handleRunTeardown, handleGetStatus, handlePatchStatus) to receive *ControlSurface instead of extracting the Engine from request context

1.3: Updates NewHandler in api/v1/routes.go to thread *ControlSurface to all 10 route handlers (handleGetGroups, handleGetGroup, handleGetMetrics, handleGetMetric, handleGetSetupData, handleSetSetupData, handleRunSetup, handleRunTeardown, handleGetStatus, handlePatchStatus)
1.4: Updates GetServer in api/server.go to accept individual dependencies instead of *core.Engine
1.5: Moves periodic threshold evaluation from core/engine.go into MetricsEngine via StartThresholdCalculations
1.6: Renames GetIngester to CreateIngester on MetricsEngine so it stores the ingester reference internally
1.7: Handles threshold abort-on-fail within MetricsEngine via the abortRun callback passed to StartThresholdCalculations
1.8: Adds GetMetricsWithBreachedThresholdsCount on MetricsEngine to query breached-threshold status directly
1.9: Removes all 4 stop-mechanism members (Stop, IsStopped, stopChan, stopOnce) from core.Engine
1.10: Adds the AbortFn func(error) field on core.Engine as the unified abort mechanism
1.11: Removes the GetRunner() method from execution.Scheduler so callers access the runner directly from the test run state
1.12: Moves the test run context creation out of the scheduler's Run method so the caller in cmd/run.go manages it
2: Documentation Maintainability
2.1: Adds a documentation comment to the ControlSurface struct explaining its purpose
3: Artifact Cleanup
3.1: Removes all 3 public context-based Engine injection items in api/common/context.go (WithEngine, GetEngine, ContextKey)
3.2: Removes the withEngine middleware function from api/server.go
4: Negative Rubrics
4.1: Changes the URL paths of existing REST API endpoints (such as /v1/status, /v1/metrics, /v1/groups, /v1/setup, /v1/teardown)
4.2: Removes existing public methods from core.Engine (such as IsTainted) that are still called by code outside the api/ package
